issues.title: no-global-import
issues.description: global import of path https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts/blob/v4.7.3/contracts/token/ERC721/ERC721.sol is not allowed. Specify names to import individually or bind all exports of the module into a name (import "path" as Name)
